violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Wall behind the bag box pop is bare plywood.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice chute on the pop machine needs to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use cups were on the ground in the dry storage area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Wall behind the bag box pop is bare ply-wood.
